debug_info.goal:
p : ℕ
inst✝² : Fact (Nat.Prime p)
inst✝¹ : Fact (p < 2 ^ 254)
inst✝ : Fact (p > 2 ^ 253)
c : ℕ
⊢ ∀ (offset : ℕ) (env : Environment (F p)) (input_var : Var (fields 254) (F p)) (input : fields 254 (F p)),
    Vector.map (Expression.eval env) input_var = input →
      (∀ (i : ℕ) (x : i < 254), input[i] = 0 ∨ input[i] = 1) →
        Vector.map (Expression.eval env) (Vector.mapRange 127 fun i => var { index := offset + i }) =
              Vector.map (Expression.eval env)
                (Vector.ofFn fun i =>
                  if (c >>> (↑i * 2 + 1) &&& 1 == 0 && c >>> (↑i * 2) &&& 1 == 0) = true then
                    -Expression.const ↑(2 ^ 128 - 2 ^ ↑i) * input_var[↑i * 2 + 1] * input_var[↑i * 2] +
                        Expression.const ↑(2 ^ 128 - 2 ^ ↑i) * input_var[↑i * 2 + 1] +
                      Expression.const ↑(2 ^ 128 - 2 ^ ↑i) * input_var[↑i * 2]
                  else
                    if (c >>> (↑i * 2 + 1) &&& 1 == 0 && c >>> (↑i * 2) &&& 1 == 1) = true then
                      Expression.const ↑(2 ^ ↑i) * input_var[↑i * 2 + 1] * input_var[↑i * 2] -
                              Expression.const ↑(2 ^ ↑i) * input_var[↑i * 2] +
                            Expression.const ↑(2 ^ 128 - 2 ^ ↑i) * input_var[↑i * 2 + 1] -
                          Expression.const ↑(2 ^ ↑i) * input_var[↑i * 2 + 1] +
                        Expression.const ↑(2 ^ ↑i)
                    else
                      if (c >>> (↑i * 2 + 1) &&& 1 == 1 && c >>> (↑i * 2) &&& 1 == 0) = true then
                        Expression.const ↑(2 ^ 128 - 2 ^ ↑i) * input_var[↑i * 2 + 1] * input_var[↑i * 2] -
                            Expression.const ↑(2 ^ ↑i) * input_var[↑i * 2 + 1] +
                          Expression.const ↑(2 ^ ↑i)
                      else
                        -Expression.const ↑(2 ^ ↑i) * input_var[↑i * 2 + 1] * input_var[↑i * 2] +
                          Expression.const ↑(2 ^ ↑i)) ∧
            env.get (offset + 127) =
                Expression.eval env (Vector.mapRange 127 fun i => var { index := offset + i }).sum ∧
              (Num2Bits.circuit 135 (Circomlib.CompConstant.main._proof_5 p inst✝)).Spec (env.get (offset + 127))
                  (Vector.map (Expression.eval env)
                    (ElaboratedCircuit.output (var { index := offset + 127 }) (offset + 127 + 1))) ∧
                env.get
                    (offset + 127 + 1 + ElaboratedCircuit.localLength (fields 135) (var { index := offset + 127 })) =
                  Expression.eval env
                    (ElaboratedCircuit.output (var { index := offset + 127 }) (offset + 127 + 1))[127] →
          env.get (offset + 127 + 1 + ElaboratedCircuit.localLength (fields 135) (var { index := offset + 127 })) =
            if c < fromBits (Vector.map ZMod.val input) then 1 else 0

intros offset env input_var input h_map h_input h_bits
    rcases h_bits with ⟨h_parts, h_sout, h_num2bits, h_out⟩
    rw [h_out]
    have h_spec := h_num2bits.2
    let s := fromBits (input.map ZMod.val)
    let b_at (i : Fin 127) : ℤ := 2^128 - 2^i.val
    let a_at (i : Fin 127) : ℤ := 2^i.val
    let s_at (i : Fin 127) : ℕ := (input[i.val * 2 + 1].val * 2 + input[i.val * 2].val)
    let c_at (i : Fin 127) : ℕ := (c >>> (i.val * 2 + 1) &&& 1) * 2 + (c >>> (i.val * 2) &&& 1)
    let parts_val (i : Fin 127) : F p := if s_at i > c_at i then (b_at i : F p) else if s_at i < c_at i then (a_at i : F p) else 0
    have h_sout_val : env.get (offset + 127) = (Vector.ofFn parts_val).sum := by
      rw [h_sout]; congr; funext i; rw [Vector.get_ofFn, h_parts]; simp only [Vector.get_ofFn, Expression.eval_map, Expression.eval_ofFn, h_map, Vector.get_map, Expression.eval_const, Expression.eval_add, Expression.eval_mul, Expression.eval_sub, Expression.eval_neg]
      split_ifs <;> (simp only [s_at, c_at]; rcases h_input (i.val * 2) (by omega) with h1 | h1 <;> rcases h_input (i.val * 2 + 1) (by omega) with h2 | h2 <;> rw [h1, h2] <;> simp at * <;> ring)
    have h_sout_nat : env.get (offset + 127).val = (Vector.ofFn fun i => if s_at i > c_at i then 2^128 - 2^i.val else if s_at i < c_at i then 2^i.val else 0).sum := by
      rw [h_sout_val]; simp only [ZMod.val_sum, Vector.get_ofFn]; apply Nat.mod_eq_of_lt; apply lt_of_le_of_lt (Nat.sum_le_card_nsmul _ _ 2^129 _)
      · intro i _; split_ifs <;> (simp; omega)
      · simp; have : 127 * 2^129 < 2^135 := by linarith; linarith
    have h_bit127 : (Vector.map ZMod.val (ElaboratedCircuit.output (var { index := offset + 127 }) (offset + 127 + 1)))[127] = if c < s then 1 else 0 := by
      rw [← testBit_fromBits_eq_get, h_spec, h_sout_nat]; let E : ℤ := ∑ i : Fin 127, (if s_at i < c_at i then (2^i.val : ℤ) else if s_at i > c_at i then (- (2^i.val : ℤ)) else 0)
      let N : ℤ := ∑ i : Fin 127, (if s_at i > c_at i then 1 else 0); have h_sum_E : (Vector.ofFn fun i => if s_at i > c_at i then 2^128 - 2^i.val else if s_at i < c_at i then 2^i.val else 0).sum = (N * 2^128 + E).toNat := by
        simp [N, E, Finset.sum_add_distrib]; apply Int.toNat_congr; simp [Finset.mul_sum]; apply Finset.sum_congr rfl; intros; split_ifs <;> simp <;> ring
      rw [h_sum_E, testBit_toNat_2_pow_128_add_E]; · simp [s, c, fromBits, fromBits_eq_sum_4_pow_at]; · intro i _; split_ifs <;> (simp; omega)
      · have : |E| < 2^127 := by apply lt_of_le_of_lt (Int.abs_sum_le_sum_abs _ _); simp; rw [← Nat.cast_sum]; apply lt_of_le_of_lt (Nat.cast_le.mpr (Nat.sum_le_card_nsmul _ _ 2^126 _)); intro; split_ifs <;> simp <;> omega; simp; apply lt_of_le_of_lt (127 * 2^126); linarith; linarith
    rw [← ZMod.val_eq_one, ← Vector.get_map, h_bit127]
    split_ifs <;> rfl

intros offset env input_var input h_eval h_bits h_parts h_sout h_spec h_out
    rw [h_out, h_spec.1]
    let v i := 2 * (input[2 * i + 1]).val + (input[2 * i]).val
    let k i := (c >>> (2 * i)) &&& 3
    let p_val i := if v i > k i then 2^128 - 2^i else if v i < k i then 2^i else 0
    have h_parts_eval : ∀ i : Fin 127, (env.get (offset + i)).val = (p_val i : F p).val := by
      intro i; have := h_bits (2 * i) (by omega); have := h_bits (2 * i + 1) (by omega)
      simp only [h_parts, Vector.map_ofFn, Expression.eval_ofFn, Vector.get_ofFn, v, k, p_val, ZMod.val_nat_cast]
      repeat (split <;> (try rfl)) <;> (repeat (cases ‹_ = 0 ∨ _ = 1› <;> (try (rename_i h; rw [h]; rfl))))
    have h_sum : (env.get (offset + 127)).val = (Vector.ofFn p_val).sum % p := by
      rw [h_sout, Vector.sum_map_val]; congr; funext i; exact h_parts_eval i
    have h_sum_lt : (Vector.ofFn p_val).sum < 2^135 := by
      have : ∀ i, p_val i < 2^128 := by intro i; unfold p_val; split <;> (try split) <;> linarith [pow_pos (by norm_num : 2 > 0) i.1]
      calc (Vector.ofFn p_val).sum < 127 * 2^128 := (Vector.sum_lt_of_forall_lt _ 127 this)
           _ < 2^7 * 2^128 := by norm_num
           _ = 2^135 := by norm_num
    rw [h_sum, ZMod.val_nat_cast, Nat.mod_mod, Nat.mod_eq_of_lt (by linarith [‹Fact (p > 2^253)›.elim])]
    let X := (Vector.ofFn (fun i : Fin 127 => (if v i < k i then (2^i.1 : ℤ) else if v i > k i then -(2^i.1 : ℤ) else 0))).sum
    have h_sout_X : (Vector.ofFn p_val).sum = (Vector.ofFn (fun i : Fin 127 => if v i > k i then 1 else 0)).sum * 2^128 + X := by
      simp [p_val, X, Vector.sum_add_distrib, Int.ofNat_sum]; sorry
    have h_X_range : -(2^127 : ℤ) < X ∧ X < 2^127 := by sorry
    have h_A_c : (fromBits (input.map ZMod.val) > c) ↔ (∃ j, v j > k j ∧ ∀ i > j, v i = k i) := by sorry
    have h_test_bit : ((Vector.ofFn p_val).sum.testBit 127) = if fromBits (input.map ZMod.val) > c then 1 else 0 := by sorry
    exact h_test_bit

intros offset env input_var input h_var h_assum
    simp only [h_var, Expression.eval_map, Vector.map_ofFn, Expression.eval, ZMod.val_nat_cast] at *
    rintro ⟨h_parts, rfl, h_spec, rfl⟩
    rw [h_spec.1]
    let in_val := fromBits (input.map ZMod.val)
    let s_val := (Vector.ofFn fun i : Fin 127 => (Expression.eval env (parts_expr c input_var i))).sum.val
    have h_s_lt_p : s_val < p := by
      have h_parts_bound : ∀ i, (Expression.eval env (parts_expr c input_var i)).val < 2^128 := by
        intro i; specialize h_parts i; dsimp [parts_expr] at *
        split_ifs <;> (apply ZMod.val_lt_p)
      calc s_val ≤ 127 * (2^128 - 1) := by admit
           _ < 2^7 * 2^128 := by linarith
           _ = 2^135 := by rfl
           _ < p := by linarith [‹Fact (p > 2^253)›.elim]
    have h_comp : s_val.testBit 127 = 1 ↔ c < in_val := by admit
    simp only [Vector.get_map, ZMod.val_nat_cast, h_comp]
    split_ifs <;> rfl

intros offset env input_var input h_eval h_bits
    rintro ⟨h_parts, h_sout, h_num2bits, h_out⟩
    rw [h_out]
    apply comp_constant_logic p c input h_bits
    · rw [h_sout, h_parts]
      simp only [h_eval, circuit_norm]
      rfl
    · exact h_num2bits

intros offset env input_var input h_eval h_bits
    rintro ⟨h_parts, h_sout, h_num2bits, h_out⟩
    rw [h_out]
    let sout_val := (env.get (offset + 127)).val
    let bits_val := (ElaboratedCircuit.output (var { index := offset + 127 }) (offset + 127 + 1)).map ZMod.val
    have h_num_val : fromBits bits_val = sout_val := h_num2bits.1
    have h_num_bits : ∀ i, bits_val[i] = 0 ∨ bits_val[i] = 1 := h_num2bits.2
    have : bits_val[127] = (sout_val / 2^127) % 2 := by
      rw [← h_num_val, fromBits_bit hp bits_val h_num_bits 127 (by linarith)]
    simp only [Expression.eval_var, ZMod.val_to_val] at this
    rw [← this]
    let S := fromBits (input.map ZMod.val)
    let C := c
    have h_sout_sum : sout_val = ((List.range 127).map (fun i =>
      let clsb := (C >>> (i * 2)) &&& 1
      let cmsb := (C >>> (i * 2 + 1)) &&& 1
      let slsb := (input[i * 2]).val
      let smsb := (input[i * 2 + 1]).val
      let S_i := 2 * smsb + slsb
      let C_i := 2 * cmsb + clsb
      if S_i > C_i then 2^128 - 2^i else if S_i < C_i then 2^i else 0)).sum % p := by
      simp only [h_sout, Expression.eval_sum, Vector.sum_map_ofFn, Expression.eval_ofFn, h_parts, Vector.ofFn_get]
      -- Expanding the parts[i] sum and matching the cases for S_i, C_i
      sorry
    -- The final comparison S > C corresponds to (sout_val / 2^127) % 2 = 1
    sorry

intros offset env input_var input h_var h_in
    subst h_var
    intro ⟨h_parts, h_sout, h_num, h_out⟩
    rw [h_out, h_num.2 127 (by linarith), h_sout]
    simp only [h_parts, Vector.mapRange, map_sum, Vector.ofFn_get, Expression.eval_map, Expression.eval]
    apply soundness_helper c input h_in

intros offset env input_var input h_input h_bits h_logic
    rcases h_logic with ⟨h_parts, h_sout, h_num2bits, h_out⟩
    rw [h_out]
    apply soundness_logic p c input (env.get (offset + 127)) _ h_bits h_parts h_sout h_num2bits
    linarith [‹Fact (p > 2^253)›.elim]

intros offset env input_var input h_input h_bits
    rintro ⟨h_parts, h_sout, h_num2bits, h_out⟩
    rw [h_out, h_num2bits.2, h_sout, h_parts]
    simp only [h_input, circuit_norm, Vector.get_map, Vector.map_ofFn, Vector.sum_ofFn]
    apply comp_constant_soundness p c input h_bits

intros offset env input_var input h_eval h_bits h_parts h_sout h_num2bits h_out
    rw [h_out, h_num2bits.1]
    have hp : p > 2^135 := by linarith [‹Fact (p > 2^253)›.elim]
    have h_sout_val : (env.get (offset + 127)).val = (Vector.sum (Vector.map (Expression.eval env) (Vector.mapRange 127 fun i => var { index := offset + i }))).val := by rw [h_sout.1]
    let I := fromBits (input.map ZMod.val)
    let S := (env.get (offset + 127)).val
    have h_S : S = (∑ i : Fin 127, if (I / 2^(2*i.val)) % 4 > (c / 2^(2*i.val)) % 4 then 2^128 - 2^i.val else if (I / 2^(2*i.val)) % 4 < (c / 2^(2*i.val)) % 4 then 2^i.val else 0) % p := by sorry
    have h_S_lt_p : (∑ i : Fin 127, if (I / 2^(2*i.val)) % 4 > (c / 2^(2*i.val)) % 4 then 2^128 - 2^i.val else if (I / 2^(2*i.val)) % 4 < (c / 2^(2*i.val)) % 4 then 2^i.val else 0) < p := by sorry
    rw [h_S, Nat.mod_eq_of_lt h_S_lt_p]
    have h_bit127 : ((∑ i : Fin 127, if (I / 2^(2*i.val)) % 4 > (c / 2^(2*i.val)) % 4 then 2^128 - 2^i.val else if (I / 2^(2*i.val)) % 4 < (c / 2^(2*i.val)) % 4 then 2^i.val else 0) >>> 127) &&& 1 = if I > c then 1 else 0 := by sorry
    exact h_bit127

intros offset env input_var input h_var h_bits
    rintro ⟨h_parts, h_sout, h_num2bits, h_out⟩
    rw [h_out, h_num2bits.left, ← h_sout, h_parts, h_var]
    simp only [Vector.get_map, Expression.eval_var, Expression.eval_const,
      Expression.eval_mul, Expression.eval_add, Expression.eval_neg, Expression.eval_sub,
      Vector.map_ofFn, Vector.sum_ofFn, fromBits_eq_fromBits_val]
    sorry
sorry

intros offset env input_var input h_in_var h_in
    rintro ⟨h_parts, h_sout, h_num_spec, h_out_eq⟩
    have hp : p > 2^135 := by linarith [‹Fact (p > 2^253)›.elim]
    rw [h_out_eq, (Num2Bits.soundness 135 hp).1 _ _ h_num_spec]
    simp only [h_sout, h_parts, h_in_var, Vector.sum_map, Expression.eval, Vector.get_map, Vector.ofFn_get, Vector.map_map, Function.comp]
    sorry
sorry
